cases.description: REVIEW mode: feedback summary request triggers read-only summary
cases.prompt: show me what feedback has accumulated in .codi/feedback/
expectations: Reads all JSON files in .codi/feedback/
Groups by artifact name (skill or rule)
Sorts by severity then timestamp
Shows the top 3 most actionable observations
Does NOT proceed to the one-at-a-time refine flow

cases.description: REVIEW mode: pre-refine check produces summary and suggests next step
cases.prompt: before I refine the rules, show me what's accumulated
expectations: Produces the REVIEW summary
Suggests running /codi-refine-rules as the next step for interactive edits
Does NOT modify any rule files

cases.description: REVIEW mode: empty feedback dir produces clear message
expectations: Detects empty .codi/feedback/
Reports 'No observations yet' with guidance that observations are collected automatically
Does NOT fabricate observations

cases.description: REFINE mode: rule feedback review triggers one-at-a-time approval
cases.prompt: review the collected rule feedback and propose improvements
expectations: Reads JSON files from .codi/feedback/rules/
Groups observations by ruleName and sorts by priority (user-correction first)
Presents a summary table before diving into individual reviews
Proposes changes one at a time, waiting for Approve/Reject/Skip/Edit

cases.description: REFINE mode: /codi-refine-rules slash triggers the interactive flow
expectations: Loads feedback and presents the priority table
Proceeds to one-at-a-time review with Approve/Reject/Skip/Edit
Does NOT fabricate observations if feedback dir is empty

cases.description: REFINE mode: empty feedback directory surfaces clear guidance
expectations: Detects the feedback directory is empty or absent
Explains that codi-rule-feedback collects observations during coding sessions
Does NOT fabricate observations

cases.description: Creating a new rule does NOT trigger refine-rules
cases.prompt: create a new rule for our Python naming conventions
expectations: Does NOT activate refine-rules skill
Routes to codi-rule-creator instead
Does NOT read .codi/feedback/rules/

cases.description: General rule audit without collected feedback routes elsewhere
cases.prompt: audit all our rules for quality
expectations: Does NOT activate refine-rules skill (it reviews collected feedback, not raw rules)
Routes to codi-compare-preset for upstream comparison or a direct review
Does NOT invent feedback entries

cases.description: Emitting a new observation does NOT trigger this skill
cases.prompt: I noticed codi-testing still references Jest but we use Vitest now
expectations: Does NOT activate refine-rules skill
codi-rule-feedback handles the observation emission (CODI-OBSERVATION marker)
Does NOT read .codi/feedback/ in response

cases.description: Actually applying rule changes uses REFINE mode, not a separate reporter
cases.prompt: apply the collected rule feedback to the rules
expectations: Activates refine-rules skill in REFINE mode
Proceeds to one-at-a-time approval flow (not only summary)
Does NOT stop after producing a summary
